scope: read-only frontend and registry smoke; no app executor, generation, publishing, account, or platform action

runtime.api: FastAPI http://127.0.0.1:8100 using isolated temporary PIXELLE_VIDEO_ROOT

registry.frontend_source: ApplicationCenterView consumes listApplications()/GET /api/apps; no second hardcoded application list

after_isolated_config_change_to_missing.action: restart isolated FastAPI sidecar against config-empty.yaml, then reload
after_isolated_config_change_to_missing.label: 需先完善配置

readiness.source: GET /api/apps readiness aggregates existing PixelleVideoConfig.llm and RunningHub configuration; no second model store

desktop_restart_route.boundary: persistent browser context simulation, not a packaged Tauri process restart

flag_on.legacy_side_effect: recoverAppState creates two local IP broadcast sessions under React StrictMode; this is pre-existing R-012 behavior, not a publishing or executor call

boundary: This evidence validates the read-only registry, shell, route reachability, route persistence, static directory interactions, readiness gating, and flag rollback only.
It does not claim application execution, provider generation, publishing, registry mutation, or administrator controls are implemented.
Legacy session POSTs are recorded explicitly; the stage does not claim zero non-GET traffic or zero legacy side effects.
